parameters.query:
(
    SELECT 
        title_cn,
        summary,
        points,
        sentiment,
        'HackerNews' as source_type,
        discussion_link,
        created_at
    FROM view_dashboard_news
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
      AND source_type = 'HackerNews'
      AND title_cn IS NOT NULL 
      AND title_cn != ''
      AND title_cn != 'null' 
      AND summary IS NOT NULL
      AND summary != ''
      AND summary != 'null'
      AND summary NOT LIKE '%Analysis failed due to content access issues%'
      AND LENGTH(summary) > 50
    ORDER BY points::int DESC
    LIMIT 7
)
UNION ALL
(
    SELECT 
        title_cn,
        summary,
        points,
        sentiment,
        'TechCrunch' as source_type,
        discussion_link,
        created_at
    FROM view_dashboard_news
    WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
      AND source_type = 'TechCrunch'
      AND title_cn IS NOT NULL 
      AND title_cn != ''
      AND title_cn != 'null' 
      AND summary IS NOT NULL
      AND summary != ''
      AND summary != 'null'
      AND summary NOT LIKE '%Analysis failed due to content access issues%'
      AND LENGTH(summary) > 50
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 7
)
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT 
    STRING_AGG(email, ', ') as bcc_list,
    
    $${{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.email_body }}$$ as email_body,
    
    $${{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.subject }}$$ as subject

FROM subscribers
WHERE is_active = TRUE;
